SLAYRUNETERRA-PETRICITE_VALLEY.title: Petricite Valley
SLAYRUNETERRA-PETRICITE_VALLEY.pages.INI:
You come across a large Valley made of Petricite.
The cold stone makes you feel uneasy.

Is it a good idea to continue through here?
In your next combat, the first [gold]Skill[/gold] you play each round costs 1 ENERGY more.
SLAYRUNETERRA-PETRICITE_VALLEY.pages.MAR: You push aside any doubt as you make your way into the Valley.
SLAYRUNETERRA-PETRICITE_VALLEY.pages.WAL: Walking around the Valley took more effort than you had thought.
SLAYRUNETERRA-INJURED_VANGUARD.title: Injured Vanguard
SLAYRUNETERRA-INJURED_VANGUARD.pages.INI: On your travels you come across an [jitter]injured vanguard[/jitter].\nShould you help them or seize the opportunity?
[green]Upgrade[/green] a random card in you deck.
You don't have any fitting cards
SLAYRUNETERRA-INJURED_VANGUARD.pages.KIL: Even injured the Vanguard put on a fight. Yet this outcome was inevitable.
SLAYRUNETERRA-INJURED_VANGUARD.pages.HEL: The Vanguard shows gratitude for your kindness.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ANCIENT_OAK.title: Ancient Oak
You come across an enormous oak tree. Getting close you hear [sine][fontsize=20]whispering[/fontsize][/sine] in your head.\n[b]Close your eyes![/b]
[green]Upgrade[/green] two random cards from you deck.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ANCIENT_OAK.pages.CLOSE_YO: You let the voice take over and faint. Once you wake up, you can't help but feel changed.
SLAYRUNETERRA-ANCIENT_OAK.pages.WITHSTAN: You do not give in to the trees wishes. The whispering grows louder and louder but you stand your ground. Eventually the whispers stop.\nYou feel stronger.
SLAYRUNETERRA-GRAND_DUELIST.title: Grand Duelist
SLAYRUNETERRA-GRAND_DUELIST.pages.BET_ON: The contestants fight to the bitter end.\nJust as you predicted, the Duelist won.
The contestants fight to the bitter end.\nDespite the odds, the Duelist lost.
The contestants fight to the bitter end.\nJust as you predicted, the Challenger won.
The contestants fight to the bitter end.\nAs you should have expected, the Challenger lost.
SLAYRUNETERRA-GRAND_DUELIST.pages.CHALLE: You and the Duelist fight nail and tooth.\nIn the end, only you still stand. You take your cut of the betting pool and leave.
SLAYRUNETERRA-DRAGONS_DEN.title: Dragons Den
You come across a large Den. Inside you find a [jitter][red]Dragon[/red][/jitter] delivering the final blow to its Prey.
Add a [gold]Twin Bite[/gold] to your Deck.
Add a [gold]Dragons Fury[/gold] to your Deck.
SLAYRUNETERRA-EXAMPLE_EVENT.title: Example
